name: create_a_customer_support
description: Customer support triage agent that classifies incoming tickets, answers common questions using FAQ knowledge, and escalates complex or sensitive issues to the appropriate specialized team.
capabilities: Ticket classification and priority assignment (P1-P4) based on issue severity and customer impact
Automated FAQ matching and response generation for common customer questions
Sentiment analysis to detect frustrated or upset customers requiring special handling
Intelligent escalation routing to billing, engineering, account management, or security teams
Customer context retrieval including account history, past tickets, and subscription tier
Multi-channel support handling across email, chat, and ticketing systems
Response drafting with consistent brand voice and tone guidelines
SLA monitoring and flagging tickets approaching breach thresholds
Tagging and categorizing tickets for reporting and trend analysis
Generating end-of-day triage summary reports with escalation statistics
